name: @axicharts/charts-mcp
description: MCP server for AxiCharts cartesian panel authoring — create, validate, revise, and compile marks[] specs.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/openapi.ts --format esm --external @axicharts/charts-spec --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/openapi.ts --format esm --external @axicharts/charts-spec --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod --watch
